title: How to push images to harbor?
body:
I successful run code from the tutorials https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/docs/tutorials/04-include-in-your-build-tool.md
I build  images successful:
![QQ截图20220609164309](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/9957813/172804712-f8e253f0-1450-41ca-a0a7-60e1a9ee3cb6.png)

Then I want to push to my harbor.
My harbor address：192.168.0.186:30102
Then I writing code:
![QQ截图20220609164727](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/9957813/172805597-45f6d1e1-3cee-48d4-80fb-490034b52a4d.png)
It is works without errors.
But there is not images in my harbor.
What should I do?

comments.body:
This is most likely a bug in harbor not showing OCI images properly. You could attempt to push them in docker format.
--format docker

The parsed `dest` value refers to a location in local storage.  References to locations in image registries typically start with "docker://".  There's a brief summary of the various location types at https://github.com/containers/skopeo/blob/main/docs/skopeo.1.md#image-names, which links to a longer one at https://github.com/containers/image/blob/main/docs/containers-transports.5.md.
@nalind Thanks for your help,I have successfully pushed images to harbor .
